titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Diana E. E. Kleiner, Deputy Provost for the Arts, Yale University, Records
Kleiner (Diana E. E.), Deputy Provost for the Arts, Yale University, Records
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 20, 2018 at 08:30
finding aid revisiion description not supplied

did.unittitle: Diana E. E. Kleiner, deputy provost for the arts, Yale University, records
did.abstract: The records consist of correspondence, committee and planning documents, and project and procedure files maintained by Diana E. E. Kleiner as deputy provost for the arts at Yale.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Provost

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 3-B (YRG 3-B), Records of Yale deputy, associate, and assistant provosts.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the office of the deputy provost, 2006.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Access to the materials is restricted. See Collection Contents for details.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Diana E.E. Kleiner, Deputy Provost for the Arts, Yale University, Records (RU 1011). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by topic.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of correspondence, committee and planning documents, and project and procedure files maintained by Diana E. E. Kleiner as deputy provost for the arts at Yale.

corpname.part: Yale University. Office of the Provost

did.unittitle: Records of the Office of Deputy Provost for the Arts
Arts Area Advisory Committee [2 of 2 only]
